Video.summary: RJ has to choose between the rockstar lifestyle or settling down with his girlfriend Elaina. Janyce learns her roommate Angel has been sharing her man David! Fed up with Stacy, Brandon lets her in on a little secret!
Video.title: I'm A Rockstar, Baby

Video.summary: Lisa's husband, Mickey, moved his mistress into their house 3 months ago! Then LaTasha's boyfriend, Maurice, has been cheating with transsexual Day Day! Maurice says it's over with Day Day, but much to his surprise, LaTasha won't take him back!
Video.title: Heartless Affairs!

Video.summary: Chyna confronts her backstabbing "friend"; Jarod says the stress of being the sole breadwinner for his family has driven him down the path of adultery; Derrick proposes to his ex-girlfriend, who is already married.
Video.title: Proposals Backfire

Video.summary: Amanda's a workaholic mother losing her grasp on a 3rd marriage and in desperate need of help.Then Daniel's learning that all it takes to ruin an engagement is one bad night as his brief love affair with his fiancee's mother is back to haunt him!
Video.title: Mad Mom Meltdown

Video.summary: Kitten wants to tell her mother that she is a prostitute because her mother was neglectful and drove her to it. These two women face off over the lies. Next ... Even though Skat's ex-girlfriend is married, he believes he can win her back!
Video.title: Heartbreaking Secrets

Video.summary: Jon wants to start fresh and come clean to his fiancee about his secret affair. But first, his secret lover, Kirn, has some news for him! Then Racquel doesn't know why she's here, but when the babysitter arrives, she figures it out in a hurry!
Video.title: I Want Your Lover!

Video.summary: Three best friends agree to have a threesome; Leo's fiancee confronts her cousin about some explicit photos she sent to him; Brian wants to leave his possessive girlfriend, but she refuses to give up without a fight.
Video.title: Threesomes and Throwdowns

Video.summary: Jada says that one lover is not enough. She wants to confront her boyfriend to tell him that there's someone else. Next Brandy's husband has moved out to be with his mistress, Rachel. Then Danielle confesses to Rashanda that she is the other woman.
Video.title: Lying Loves Confess

Video.summary: Donita says she's had a burning desire to be in porn. Today she'll tell her husband. Next David has a feeling that his girlfriend, Chastity, has been up to no good. Next Lee doesn't like his sister's chosen profession and is here to put an end to it.
Video.title: Erotic Jobs

Video.summary: Chris wants his wife Ariel to quit stripping, but she refuses. Next Jenna will tell her boyfriend, Tim, about her "banana split" act. Then twins Amber and Heather perform together on stage, but off stage they are fighting over the same man.
Video.title: Sexy Strippers Exposed!

Video.summary: Stephanie's very suspicious that fiance Ryan has been cheating because he comes home reeking of body spray. Then Whisky business! After getting rejected in a proposal to his girlfriend, Bob polished off a bottle of whisky with her mother.
Video.title: Busted...On Bended Knee

Video.summary: Are you looking for fast cash but feel you don't have the skills well our guests today have started a family business…they're selling sex and they're ready to reveal their secrets!
Video.title: The Hooker Family Hour

Video.summary: Craig wants the best for his niece, Krysti, and feels her boyfriend, Randy, isn't right for her. Next Teresa plans to raise her child in the KKK and her fiance, a former Klan member, is here to talk some sense into her.
Video.title: Battle Of The Wounded Lovers!

Video.summary: Tiffany's many lovers are here today! Jimmy and his girlfriend's best friend have been messing around.
Video.title: I Have A Sexy Secret!

Video.summary: Our guests today have been wrapped around their lovers fingers and their finally ready to put a ring on it.
Video.title: Bridal Bombshells

Video.summary: Rich and Dreama, bribed Dreama's sister, Tabby, to have sex with them before they would baby-sit her children so she could go to work at her local go go club. Then Steve is tired of supporting his daughter, Christy, and her lazy boyfriend.
Video.title: Country Lovin'!

Video.summary: Chauncey tells Paula he's been cheating! Little people Eric and his family return!
Video.title: Holiday Hell 2003

Video.summary: Sheene’s got a little secret. Tabitha says she’s worried that her boyfriend may be back to his cheating ways.
Video.title: Single And Ready to Mingle

Video.summary: Rob hates his brother, Steve, and can't wait to tell him that he's sleeping with his fiancee and she's going home with him! Next Meg will make it clear to her boyfriend that she is serious about her unusual fantasy of having sex with clowns!
Video.title: Springer Scandals

Video.summary: Dra confesses to his girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with his best friend’s girlfriend.
Video.title: Steamy Confessions

Video.summary: Paige wants her man to commit; Monica suspects her daughter's boyfriend is cheating; Ashleigh wants two women to show off their hidden talents to win her love.
Video.title: Barely Legal Hook-Ups

Video.summary: Arianna learns that her girlfriend has another on the side; Anthony says he made a mistake in cheating on his girlfriend, but the other woman will stop at nothing to be with him.
Video.title: In Your Face Mistresses

Video.summary: Did Chris and Shawn move to escape his ex Joy or to hide his extracurriculars with her?
Video.title: Ex-Lovers Confronted

Video.summary: Mehren says everything would be just great with her boyfriend, John, if only his wife would leave them alone! Next Greg is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend, Yolanda!
Video.title: I Admit ... I'm Cheating

Video.summary: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.
Video.title: It's Your Fault I'm Cheating!

Video.summary: Yolando regrets sleeping with her best friend’s boyfriend and Cam has been holding back from his roommates.
Video.title: I Have To Tell You This

Image.alt: I Have To Tell You This
I Have To Tell You This
I Have To Tell You This

Video.summary: Jamie has been stripping and cheating on her boyfriend with a woman! Then, Steve believes his wife’s been cheating with another man. Next LaToya's here to cause a family feud. She's been cheating with her girlfriend's sister!
Video.title: Hidden Affairs!

Video.summary: Katrina says that her emotional needs are not being met, so she started cheating with Michaell, a drag queen. Then John explains to his girlfriend that he has recently acquired a female "indentured servant."
Video.title: Stunning Secrets Revealed!

Video.summary: Rebecca is here today to demand that her sister, Robin, divorce so that she can marry her man!
Video.title: I'm On Springer… And I'm Mad!

Image.alt: I'm On Springer… And I'm Mad!
I'm On Springer… And I'm Mad!
I'm On Springer… And I'm Mad!

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her twin sister's boyfriend; a man is caught between two women; a man asks a friend to lie for him.
Video.title: I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom

Image.alt: I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom
I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom
I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom

Video.summary: Reno has been dating Lavan for 6 months but has had a secret for the entirety of their relationship. Now Reno is ready to reveal that she is actually a woman, not a man.
Video.title: Honey...I'm A Woman

Video.summary: Deciding what you want to be in life can be tough, but telling your loved ones you want to be a porn star can be even harder!
Video.title: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star

Image.alt: Who Wants To Be A Porn Star
Who Wants To Be A Porn Star
